html:
{#- VAC Tax Invoice — replica of the BusyWin bill layout (File.pdf, 2026-07-12). Used by Print Formats: "VAC Tax Invoice A4" and (compact CSS) "VAC Tax Invoice A5". Licence numbers are hardcoded (no ERPNext home). GSTIN comes from the document's frozen company_gstin, falling back to Company.gstin. is_return -> CREDIT NOTE face. ERPNext stores returns NEGATIVE (qty=-9, grand_total=-35310) while in_words stays POSITIVE, so a raw render prints "-35,310.00" against "Thirty Five Thousand ... Only". `sgn` flips returns back to positive; on a normal invoice sgn is 1, so those bills render EXACTLY as before. (sgn, not |abs: it preserves a genuinely negative line on a mixed document instead of silently making it positive.) -#} {%- set is_ret = doc.get("is_return") or 0 -%} {%- set sgn = -1 if is_ret else 1 -%} {%- set mobile = doc.contact_mobile or frappe.db.get_value("Customer", doc.customer, "mobile_no") or "" -%} {%- set copy_label = "Original Copy" -%}
{{ "CREDIT NOTE" if is_ret else "TAX INVOICE" }} {{ copy_label }}
VIJAY AGRO CENTRE
NEAR BANK OF INDIA, SIHORA 441915
TAL- TUMSAR, DIST- BHANDARA
9881527395, 9422833565
GSTIN : {{ doc.company_gstin or frappe.db.get_value("Company", doc.company, "gstin") or "" }}
PEST. LIC.LCID0820221786BHA
SEED LIC.LCSD0420221004BHA
FERT. LIC.LCRFD0520220248BHA
{{ "Credit to :" if is_ret else "Billed to :" }}
{{ doc.customer_name or doc.customer }}
{%- if doc.address_display %}
{{ doc.address_display | safe }}
{% endif %}
GSTIN : {{ doc.billing_address_gstin or "" }}
{{ "Credit Note No. :" if is_ret else "Invoice No. :" }}{{ doc.name }}
Dated :{{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.posting_date, "dd/MM/yyyy") }}
{%- if is_ret and doc.get("return_against") %}
Against Invoice :{{ doc.return_against }}
{%- endif %}
Party Mobile No :{{ mobile }}
{%- set ns = namespace(total_qty=0, total_disc=0) -%} {%- for d in doc.items -%} {%- set ns.total_qty = ns.total_qty + d.qty * sgn -%} {%- set ns.total_disc = ns.total_disc + (d.discount_amount or 0) * d.qty * sgn -%} {%- set mfg = frappe.db.get_value("Item", d.item_code, "pd_manufacturer") or "" -%} {%- endfor -%} {%- set fill = "f-tall" if doc.items | length <= 8 else ("f-mid" if doc.items | length <= 16 else "f-none") -%}
PRODUCTS PACKING HSN
CODE		 MFG
NAME		 LIST
PRICE		 DISC.
RATE		 DISC.
AMT.		 QTY RATE AMOUNT
{{ loop.index }} {{ d.item_name }} {%- if d.batch_no %}
BATCH : {{ d.batch_no }}
{%- endif %} 		{{ d.uom }} {{ d.gst_hsn_code or "" }} {{ mfg }} {{ "%.2f" | format(d.price_list_rate or d.rate) }} {{ "%.2f" | format(d.discount_percentage or 0) }} {{ "%.2f" | format(d.discount_amount or 0) }} {{ "%g" | format(d.qty * sgn) }} {{ "%.2f" | format(d.rate) }} {{ "%.2f" | format(d.amount * sgn) }}
{{ "%.2f" | format(ns.total_disc) }} {{ "%.3f" | format(ns.total_qty) }}
{%- set charge_rows = [] -%} {%- for t in doc.taxes if t.tax_amount and not t.account_head.startswith("Output Tax") -%} {%- set _ = charge_rows.append(t) -%} {%- endfor -%} {%- if charge_rows or doc.discount_amount %} {%- for t in charge_rows %} {%- endfor %} {%- if doc.discount_amount %} {%- endif %}
{{ "Less" if t.tax_amount * sgn < 0 else "Add" }} : {{ t.description }} {{ "%.2f" | format(t.tax_amount | abs) }}
Less : Discount {{ "%.2f" | format(doc.discount_amount * sgn) }}
{%- endif %}
{{ "Credit Total" if is_ret else "Grand Total" }} ₹ {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money((doc.rounded_total or doc.grand_total) * sgn) }}
{%- set rates = {} -%} {%- for d in doc.items -%} {%- set r = (d.cgst_rate or 0) + (d.sgst_rate or 0) + (d.igst_rate or 0) -%} {%- if r not in rates -%}{%- set _ = rates.update({r: {"taxable": 0, "cgst": 0, "sgst": 0}}) -%}{%- endif -%} {%- set _ = rates[r].update({ "taxable": rates[r]["taxable"] + (d.taxable_value or d.net_amount or 0) * sgn, "cgst": rates[r]["cgst"] + (d.cgst_amount or 0) * sgn, "sgst": rates[r]["sgst"] + (d.sgst_amount or 0) * sgn}) -%} {%- endfor -%}
{%- for r, v in rates.items() | sort %} {%- if r or v.taxable %} {%- endif %} {%- endfor %}
Tax RateTaxable Amt.CGST Amt.SGST Amt.Total Tax
{{ "%g" | format(r) }}% {{ "%.2f" | format(v.taxable) }} {{ "%.2f" | format(v.cgst) }} {{ "%.2f" | format(v.sgst) }} {{ "%.2f" | format(v.cgst + v.sgst) }}
Rupees {{ (doc.in_words or "").replace("INR ", "").replace(" only.", " Only") }}


{{ "CUSTOMER'S ACKNOWLEDGEMENT" if is_ret else "RECEIVER'S SIGNATURE" }}		 FOR, VIJAY AGRO CENTRE


AUTHORIZED SIGNATURE

CODE		 MFG NAME QTY
{{ loop.index }} {{ d.item_name }} {%- if d.batch_no %}
BATCH : {{ d.batch_no }}
{% endif %} 		{{ d.uom }} {{ d.gst_hsn_code or "" }} {{ mfg }} {{ "%g" | format(d.qty * sgn) }}
Total Qty {{ "%.3f" | format(ns.total_qty) }}
{%- if doc.customer != "Cash Customer" -%} {%- set glf = {"party_type": "Customer", "party": doc.customer, "company": doc.company, "is_cancelled": 0} -%} {%- set glrows = frappe.get_all("GL Entry", filters=glf, fields=["debit", "credit"], limit_page_length=0) -%} {%- set bal = (glrows | sum(attribute="debit")) - (glrows | sum(attribute="credit")) -%} {#- bal is the customer's WHOLE account balance (all vouchers), which is what the driver collects. It already includes this bill's unpaid portion, so the rest is the customer's earlier dues -> shown as "Previous Balance" so the total reads sensibly (This Bill + Previous = Total). Raw, not *sgn, since bal is raw; the row is hidden when there is no earlier balance. -#} {%- set this_total = doc.rounded_total or doc.grand_total -%} {%- set paid = doc.paid_amount or 0 -%} {%- set prev = bal - (this_total - paid) -%}
{%- if bal > 0.5 %}
{{ "This Credit" if is_ret else "This Bill" }}₹ {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(this_total * sgn) }}
{{ "Refunded Now" if is_ret else "Received Now" }}₹ {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(paid * sgn) }}
{%- if prev | abs > 0.5 %}
Previous Balance₹ {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(prev) }}
{%- endif %}
Total Pending₹ {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(bal) }}
{%- else %}
NO PAYMENT PENDING
{%- endif %}
{%- endif -%} {%- if is_ret %} {%- else %} {%- endif %}
GOODS RETURNED BY CUSTOMER


CUSTOMER'S SIGNATURE

RECEIVED IN GOOD CONDITION
RECEIVER'S SIGNATURE		FOR, VIJAY AGRO CENTRE


AUTHORIZED SIGNATURE

PO has NO posting_date (uses transaction_date), NO batch_no, NO is_return — all optional reads go through .get() so a missing field can't 500 the render. -#} {%- set mobile = doc.contact_mobile or frappe.db.get_value("Supplier", doc.supplier, "mobile_no") or "" -%}

FERT. LIC.LCRFD0520220248BHA
Order to :
{{ doc.supplier_name or doc.supplier }}
{%- if doc.address_display %}
{{ doc.address_display | safe }}
{% endif %}
GSTIN : {{ doc.get("supplier_gstin") or "" }}
Order No. :{{ doc.name }}
Dated :{{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.transaction_date, "dd/MM/yyyy") }}

Required By :{{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.schedule_date, "dd/MM/yyyy") }}
{%- endif %} {%- if mobile %}

{% endif %} {%- if doc.get("set_warehouse") %}
Deliver To :{{ doc.set_warehouse }}
{%- endif %}
{%- set ns = namespace(total_qty=0) -%} {%- for d in doc.items -%} {%- set ns.total_qty = ns.total_qty + (d.qty | abs) -%} {%- set mfg = frappe.db.get_value("Item", d.item_code, "pd_manufacturer") or "" -%} {%- set grate = (d.get("cgst_rate") or 0) + (d.get("sgst_rate") or 0) + (d.get("igst_rate") or 0) -%} {%- endfor -%} {%- set fill = "f-tall" if doc.items | length <= 8 else ("f-mid" if doc.items | length <= 16 else "f-none") -%}
PRODUCTS PACKING HSN
CODE		 MFG NAME QTY RATE GST
%		 AMOUNT
{{ loop.index }} {{ d.item_name }} {{ d.uom }} {{ d.get("gst_hsn_code") or "" }} {{ mfg }} {{ "%g" | format(d.qty | abs) }} {{ "%.2f" | format(d.rate | abs) }} {{ "%g" | format(grate) }} {{ "%.2f" | format(d.amount | abs) }}
Total Qty {{ "%.3f" | format(ns.total_qty) }}
{#- charges = any tax row that is NOT input GST (mirrors the sales format's "Output Tax" exclusion); freight/loading etc. show as Add/Less lines. -#} {%- set charge_rows = [] -%} {%- for t in doc.taxes if t.tax_amount and not t.account_head.startswith("Input Tax") -%} {%- set _ = charge_rows.append(t) -%} {%- endfor -%} {%- if charge_rows or doc.get("discount_amount") %} {%- for t in charge_rows %} {%- endfor %} {%- if doc.get("discount_amount") %} {%- endif %}
{{ "Less" if t.tax_amount < 0 else "Add" }} : {{ t.description }} {{ "%.2f" | format(t.tax_amount | abs) }}
Less : Discount {{ "%.2f" | format(doc.discount_amount | abs) }}
{%- endif %}
Order Value ₹ {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money((doc.rounded_total or doc.grand_total) | abs) }}
{#- rate-wise GST from the PER-ITEM India Compliance fields: the header tax rows carry rate=0 with a lump amount, so they can't be grouped by rate. -#} {%- set rates = {} -%} {%- set gns = namespace(any_gst=false) -%} {%- for d in doc.items -%} {%- set r = (d.get("cgst_rate") or 0) + (d.get("sgst_rate") or 0) + (d.get("igst_rate") or 0) -%} {%- if r not in rates -%}{%- set _ = rates.update({r: {"taxable": 0, "cgst": 0, "sgst": 0, "igst": 0}}) -%}{%- endif -%} {%- set _ = rates[r].update({ "taxable": rates[r]["taxable"] + ((d.get("taxable_value") or d.get("net_amount") or 0) | abs), "cgst": rates[r]["cgst"] + ((d.get("cgst_amount") or 0) | abs), "sgst": rates[r]["sgst"] + ((d.get("sgst_amount") or 0) | abs), "igst": rates[r]["igst"] + ((d.get("igst_amount") or 0) | abs)}) -%} {%- if r %}{%- set gns.any_gst = true -%}{%- endif -%} {%- endfor -%}
{%- if gns.any_gst %} {%- for r, v in rates.items() | sort %} {%- if r or v.taxable %} {%- endif %} {%- endfor %}
Tax RateTaxable Amt.CGST Amt.SGST Amt. IGST Amt.Total Tax
{{ "%g" | format(r) }}% {{ "%.2f" | format(v.taxable) }} {{ "%.2f" | format(v.cgst) }} {{ "%.2f" | format(v.sgst) }} {{ "%.2f" | format(v.igst) }} {{ "%.2f" | format(v.cgst + v.sgst + v.igst) }}
{%- endif %}

name: VAC Purchase Order

html:
{#- VAC Goods Received Note — Busy-style frame, GOODS-MOVEMENT columns only. Serves TWO Print Formats off this one file (same idiom as the A4/A5 tax invoice): "VAC Goods Received Note" -> Purchase Receipt "VAC Goods Received Slip" -> Purchase Invoice (goods arrive on the PI itself: 726 PIs vs 8 PRs, so most stock-in has no PR doc to print — mirrors how VAC Delivery Slip renders a delivery note off a Sales Invoice) Purchase Invoice and Purchase Receipt share every field this template touches; only the reference labels differ, hence is_pi. NO price / rate / amount / tax columns, by design: this is a goods note — what physically arrived (or went back), for the store to check and sign. The money face of the same document is "VAC Purchase Voucher" (or its DEBIT NOTE face on a return). Same rule as VAC Delivery Note / VAC Delivery Slip. is_return -> goods going BACK to the supplier. ERPNext signs returns NEGATIVE (qty=-60) so qty is printed | abs. -#} {%- set is_ret = doc.get("is_return") or 0 -%} {%- set is_pi = doc.doctype == "Purchase Invoice" -%} {%- set mobile = doc.contact_mobile or frappe.db.get_value("Supplier", doc.supplier, "mobile_no") or "" -%}
{{ "GOODS RETURN NOTE" if is_ret else "GOODS RECEIVED NOTE" }} {{ "Supplier Copy" if is_ret else "Store Copy" }}
VIJAY AGRO CENTRE
NEAR BANK OF INDIA, SIHORA 441915
TAL- TUMSAR, DIST- BHANDARA
9881527395, 9422833565
GSTIN : {{ doc.company_gstin or frappe.db.get_value("Company", doc.company, "gstin") or "" }}
PEST. LIC.LCID0820221786BHA
SEED LIC.LCSD0420221004BHA
FERT. LIC.LCRFD0520220248BHA
{{ "Returned to :" if is_ret else "Received from :" }}
{{ doc.supplier_name or doc.supplier }}
{%- if doc.address_display %}
{{ doc.address_display | safe }}
{% endif %}
GSTIN : {{ doc.get("supplier_gstin") or "" }}
 {%- if is_ret %}
Return No. :{{ doc.name }}
{%- else %}

{#- VAC Purchase Voucher — Purchase Invoice, Busy-style frame. Print Format: "VAC Purchase Voucher". Shares vac_tax_invoice_a4.css. Deliberately NOT titled "TAX INVOICE": a Purchase Invoice records what a SUPPLIER sold to VAC, so the supplier's own bill is the tax document — this is VAC's filing copy of it, and it leads with their bill_no (set on 724 of 726 submitted PIs). When is_return is set VAC IS the issuer, so it prints as a DEBIT NOTE addressed to the supplier. Returns are NEGATIVE-signed in ERPNext while in_words stays positive, so every figure is printed | abs. -#} {%- set is_ret = doc.get("is_return") or 0 -%} {%- set mobile = doc.contact_mobile or frappe.db.get_value("Supplier", doc.supplier, "mobile_no") or "" -%}

name: VAC Purchase Voucher

html:
{#- VAC Goods Received Note — Busy-style frame, GOODS-MOVEMENT columns only. Serves TWO Print Formats off this one file (same idiom as the A4/A5 tax invoice): "VAC Goods Received Note" -> Purchase Receipt "VAC Goods Received Slip" -> Purchase Invoice (goods arrive on the PI itself: 726 PIs vs 8 PRs, so most stock-in has no PR doc to print — mirrors how VAC Delivery Slip renders a delivery note off a Sales Invoice) Purchase Invoice and Purchase Receipt share every field this template touches; only the reference labels differ, hence is_pi. NO price / rate / amount / tax columns, by design: this is a goods note — what physically arrived (or went back), for the store to check and sign. The money face of the same document is "VAC Purchase Voucher" (or its DEBIT NOTE face on a return). Same rule as VAC Delivery Note / VAC Delivery Slip. is_return -> goods going BACK to the supplier. ERPNext signs returns NEGATIVE (qty=-60) so qty is printed | abs. -#} {%- set is_ret = doc.get("is_return") or 0 -%} {%- set is_pi = doc.doctype == "Purchase Invoice" -%} {%- set mobile = doc.contact_mobile or frappe.db.get_value("Supplier", doc.supplier, "mobile_no") or "" -%}

html:
{#- VAC RTGS/NEFT Request — Bank of India (Sihora branch) application form, pre-filled from a Payment Entry. Print Format: "VAC RTGS NEFT Request". Replicates the branch's own "APPLICATION CUM REQUEST FORM FOR RTGS/NEFT" (sample: VAC_Payment-.pdf 2026-07-16), so the teller sees a familiar sheet. Monochrome on purpose — it is the bank's form, not a VAC bill. Sender block = fixed VAC @ BOI Sihora C/C constants from the sample. Beneficiary block = doc.party + its Bank Account (party_bank_account); anything unknown renders as a dotted line to fill by hand. All optional reads go through .get() / guarded lookups so a missing field or absent Bank Account can't 500 the render. -#} {%- set amount = frappe.utils.fmt_money(doc.paid_amount) -%} {%- set is_rtgs = (doc.paid_amount or 0) >= 200000 -%} {#- the CHEQUE fields are for the debit instrument VAC hands the branch, not the transfer's UTR — so only print reference_no there when it actually looks like a cheque number (short, all digits) -#} {%- set refno = (doc.get("reference_no") or "") | string -%} {%- set chq = refno if refno.replace(" ", "").isdigit() and (refno | length) <= 8 else "" -%} {#- party bank account: the PE's explicit pick, else the party's own Bank Account record (imported from BusyWin 2026-07-16) — namespace because a jinja set inside if does not escape the block -#} {%- set nsb = namespace(pba=None) -%} {%- if doc.get("party_bank_account") -%} {%- set nsb.pba = frappe.get_doc("Bank Account", doc.party_bank_account) -%} {%- elif doc.get("party") and doc.get("party_type") -%} {%- set _rows = frappe.get_all("Bank Account", filters={"party_type": doc.party_type, "party": doc.party, "disabled": 0}, fields=["name"], limit=1) -%} {%- if _rows -%}{%- set nsb.pba = frappe.get_doc("Bank Account", _rows[0].name) -%}{%- endif -%} {%- endif -%} {%- set pba = nsb.pba -%} {%- set ben_bank = "" -%} {%- if pba and pba.bank -%} {%- set ben_bank = frappe.db.get_value("Bank", pba.bank, "bank_name") or pba.bank -%} {%- endif -%} {%- set ben_mobile = "" -%} {%- if doc.party_type in ("Supplier", "Customer") -%} {%- set ben_mobile = frappe.db.get_value(doc.party_type, doc.party, "mobile_no") or "" -%} {%- elif doc.party_type == "Employee" -%} {%- set ben_mobile = frappe.db.get_value("Employee", doc.party, "cell_number") or "" -%} {%- endif -%} {%- set addr_rows = frappe.get_all("Address", filters=[["Dynamic Link", "link_doctype", "=", doc.party_type or "Supplier"], ["Dynamic Link", "link_name", "=", doc.party or ""]], fields=["address_line1", "city"], limit=1) if doc.get("party") else [] -%} {%- set ben_addr = ((addr_rows[0].address_line1 or "") ~ (", " if addr_rows[0].address_line1 and addr_rows[0].city else "") ~ (addr_rows[0].city or "")) if addr_rows else "" -%}
REQUEST FOR RTGS / NEFT
BANK OF INDIA
SIHORA BRANCH
APPLICATION CUM REQUEST FORM FOR RTGS / NEFT
{{ "☑" | safe if is_rtgs else "☐" | safe }} RTGS {{ "☑" | safe if not is_rtgs else "☐" | safe }} NEFT
A. SENDER'S / CUSTOMER DETAILS
1.NAME OF THE CUSTOMER / SENDERVIJAY AGRO CENTRE
2.ADDRESSNEAR BANK OF INDIA, SIHORA 441915, TAL- TUMSAR, DIST- BHANDARA
3.TEL NO. OR MOBILE NO.9422833565
4.TYPE OF A/CC/C
5.ACCOUNT NO.921130100000025
6.TYPE OF TRANSACTION TO BE INITIATEDTRANSFER
7.AMOUNT TO BE SENT₹ {{ amount }}
8.CHEQUE NO.{{ chq }}
9.CHEQUE DATE{{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.reference_date, "dd/MM/yyyy") if chq and doc.get("reference_date") else "" }}
B. BENEFICIARY DETAILS
1.NAME OF BENEFICIARY{{ doc.party_name or doc.party or "" }}
2.ADDRESS{{ ben_addr }}
3.TEL NO. OR MOBILE NO.{{ ben_mobile }}
4.BENEFICIARY BANK NAME{{ ben_bank }}
5.BANK BRANCH
6.ADDRESS OF THE BRANCH
7.IFSC CODE{{ pba.get("branch_code") or "" if pba else "" }}
8.AMOUNT TO BE SENT₹ {{ amount }}
9.TYPE OF BENEFICIARY ACCOUNT{{ pba.get("account_type") or "" if pba else "" }}
10.ACCOUNT NO. OF BENEFICIARY{{ pba.get("bank_account_no") or "" if pba else "" }}
I authorize you to send the above mentioned amount to the credit of the beneficiary account by RTGS / NEFT and deduct the charges as applicable from my account. I hereby also agree and confirm that the above information provided by me for RTGS / NEFT is correct and the Bank will not be held responsible for any wrong transaction based on the above information.
DATE : {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.posting_date, "dd/MM/yyyy") }}
TIME :
PLACE : SIHORA
PROPRIETOR
VIJAY AGRO CENTRE, SIHORA
{{ doc.name }} · {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.posting_date, "dd/MM/yyyy") }}
name: VAC RTGS NEFT Request

html:
{#- VAC Deposit Slip — Bank of India (Sihora) DEPOSIT / PAY IN SLIP, pre-filled from a Bank Deposit Voucher (denomination counts included) or a Payment Entry Internal Transfer (denominations left blank to fill by hand). Print Formats: "VAC Deposit Slip" (Bank Deposit Voucher) and "VAC Deposit Slip PE" (Payment Entry) — one HTML, branches on doctype. Sample: Desktop/Deposit Slip.pdf (BOI PAP 5,00,000lvs 4/2017), English face. Monochrome bank skin. The account-number boxes fill only when the deposit target is VAC's BOI account — for any other bank they stay blank. -#} {%- set amt = doc.get("transfer_amount") or doc.get("paid_amount") or 0 -%} {%- set target = doc.get("to_account") or doc.get("paid_to") or "" -%} {%- set is_boi = target == "VAC Bank OF India - VAC" -%} {%- set words = frappe.utils.money_in_words(amt).replace("INR ", "") -%} {#- denomination map (BDV only): '500' -> row; coins = 2 + 1 pooled -#} {%- set dmap = {} -%} {%- for d in doc.get("denominations") or [] -%} {%- if dmap.update({d.denomination: d}) -%}{%- endif -%} {%- endfor -%} {%- set has_denoms = dmap | length > 0 -%} {%- set coins_amt = (dmap.get("2").amount if dmap.get("2") else 0) + (dmap.get("1").amount if dmap.get("1") else 0) -%}
BANK OF INDIA
SIHORA BRANCH		 DEPOSIT / PAY IN SLIP
Date : {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.posting_date, "dd/MM/yyyy") }}
SB / CA / CD / OD / CC / RD / TL / DL / Loan A/c. No. / Credit Card No.
{%- if is_boi -%} {%- for ch in "921130100000025" -%}{{ ch }}{%- endfor -%} {%- else -%} {%- for i in range(15) -%} {%- endfor -%} {%- endif -%}
Name :VIJAY AGRO CENTRE Tel. No. / Mobile No. :9422833565
₹ in words : {{ words }}
Cheque No. · Date · Bank & Branch NameRs.P.
 
 
{%- if amt >= 50000 %}
For Cash Deposit of ₹ 50,000/- & above   PAN No. : ABCPH6300F
{%- endif %}
TOTAL   ₹ {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(amt) }}
{{ doc.doctype }} · {{ doc.name }}{{ " · via " ~ doc.journal_entry if doc.get("journal_entry") }}
 {%- for den in ["2000", "500", "200", "100", "50", "20", "10", "5"] -%} {%- set row = dmap.get(den) -%} {%- endfor %}
CASH DEPOSIT
Note		No.₹
{{ den }} × {{ row.qty if row and row.qty else ("" if has_denoms else "") }} {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(row.amount) if row and row.amount else "" }}
Coins {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(coins_amt) if coins_amt else "" }}
Total {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(amt) if has_denoms else "" }}
Clerk / Cashier
Signature of Depositor
VIJAY AGRO CENTRE, SIHORA
